master_is_stable.symptom: The cluster has a stable master node

disk.symptom: The cluster has enough available disk space.

shards_capacity.symptom: The cluster has enough room to add new shards.

shards_availability.symptom: This cluster has 15 unavailable replica shards.

impacts.description: Searches might be slower than usual. Fewer redundant copies of the data exist on 15 indices [.ds-filebeat-8.15.2-2026.05.15-000001, .ds-filebeat-8.15.2-2026.06.14-000002, .ds-logs-docker-8.15.2-2026.05.15-2026.05.15-000001, .ds-logs-docker-8.15.2-2026.05.15-2026.06.14-000002, .ds-logs-docker-default-2026.05.15-000001, .ds-logs-docker-default-2026.06.14-000002, agent_semantic_memory, elastro-logloom-enrichment, flume-gateway-logloom-enrichment, flume-worker-logloom-enrichment, ...].

diagnosis.cause: Elasticsearch isn't allowed to allocate some shards from these indices to any of the nodes in the desired data tier because there are not enough nodes in the [data_hot] tier to allocate each shard copy on a different node.
diagnosis.action: Increase the number of nodes in this tier or decrease the number of replica shards in the affected indices.

diagnosis.cause: Elasticsearch isn't allowed to allocate some shards from these indices to any of the nodes in the desired data tier because there are not enough nodes in the [data_content] tier to allocate each shard copy on a different node.
diagnosis.action: Increase the number of nodes in this tier or decrease the number of replica shards in the affected indices.

data_stream_lifecycle.symptom: Data streams are executing their lifecycles without issues

slm.symptom: No Snapshot Lifecycle Management policies configured
